Fuzz Guitar Pedal

2026

Designed, prototyped, built, and revised a custom fuzz pedal using an LM386 op-amp clipping circuit.

Vintage Amplifier Rebuild

2026

Rebuilt internals of a vintage amp by recapping, fixing lifting solder pads, and adjusting the bias control to prevent distortion.
